headline: Vistra Corp. (VST) Rating Maintained Overweight at Morgan Stanley Amid Utility Sector Growth
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 10 Quality Value Stocks Likely to Make a Comeback According to Analysts. Vistra Corp. is one of the best value stocks on this list. TheFly reported on March 23 that Morgan Stanley kept an Overweight rating on VST while lowering its price target from $215 to $214. The firm […]

headline: How to Play Defense in This Market: Embrace Utilities
summary: Utilities are historically considered defensive stocks.  Few sectors appear more war-proof than utilities, whose assets are contained in the U.S., protected by state regulation and provide an essential service.  Utilities are down 4% since the start of the conflict, outperforming the broader index by 3.5 percentage points.

headline: Caterpillar, Vistra, Target And A Financial Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: Rob Sechan picks Vistra Corp. as his final trade, while Kevin Simpson chooses Caterpillar Inc. and Jim Lebenthal recommends Citigroup Inc.
